publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

p.subject: {**Subject Code, Use collection subject browse list}

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-29 18:18:16 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Harvey Reissig papers
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, grant and consultant files, talks, reprints and slides, photographs and CDs of his research trips.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor of Entomology, New York State Experiment Station, Geneva and former director of Cornell's Pesticide Management Education Program (PMEP).

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, grant and consultant files, talks, reprints and slides, photographs and CDs of his research trips.

emph.ref: Series I. Research, Projects, and Assessments
Series IV. Meetings, Committees, and Conferences

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Harvey Reissig Papers, #22-2-4279 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Entomology -- Study and teaching.
Universities and colleges -- Faculty.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State Agricultural Experiment Station
New York State College of Agriculture. Department of Entomology

did.unittitle: Series I. Research, Projects, and Assessments
Subseries Ia. General
Oriental Fruit Moth (OFM) Research (1 of 2)

scopecontent.p: Reports specifically on controlling the oriental fruit moth in peaches and other stone fruits

did.unittitle: Apple Project in Hungary - Integrated Pest Management (IPM) (1 of 2)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes business cards; published research papers; The Story of Sarospatak Academy by M. Eugene Osterhaven; booklet on plant protection; map of Hungary; booklet on fruit juice; travel brochure; includes color photos and photo negatives

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence; published reports; includes a sticker for an institute; brochure for the Ministry of Agriculture in Hungary; brochure for travel in Budapest; blank postcard; brochure for Tuzser, Hungary

did.unittitle: Integrated Pest Management (IPM) Project in Armenia

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes booklet on Armenian Scientific-Research Institute of Plant Protection; includes business cards; correspondence; booklet on the wines of Amenia; includes passenger tickets and baggage checks

scopecontent.p: Includes brochures for The New York State Integrated Pest Management Program; projector lesson sheets
